Her face is exquisite and unreadable, organic features stretched over high cheekbones with eyes that track you like targeting lasers. Chrome ball-socket shoulder joints connect to articulated servo arms, hydraulic pistons visible at every elbow flex. Her torso is a translucent smoke-grey acrylic panel revealing gear clusters and a pulsing power core where ribs should be. Segmented chrome spine visible through the transparent back plate, each vertebra a separate mechanical unit. Her legs are fully chrome-plated from hip to ankle, hinge joints at knee and ankle exposed and functional. She doesn't pose. She calculates. Every micro-movement whispers lethality. You can't tell if she was born human or something else entirely, but the machine claimed most of her long ago. Sexy as fuck, dangerous as hell, watching you with cold intent.

Organic face carved with alien beauty—slightly elongated cranium, eyes with double pupils that never blink in unison. Fingers are articulated surgical steel, no flesh, each joint a separate servo. Chest is a lattice of black chrome ribs caging a crystalline power matrix. Hips connect to segmented chrome legs, every piston and actuator visible. She stares through you like she's reading your extinction date. Mysterious, surgical, absolutely lethal. A priestess of violence in a body that whispers prophecy and murder.
